violations.description: Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not placed in a self-draining position. Mop heads were not inverted or place in a way to allow mop to dry.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Employee went from working register to take food off grill with bare hands without handwashing.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Ice Machine had residue build up inside/around ice chute.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Vents in kitchen area ceiling contained build up of dust.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. Light in walk in cooler does not have a shield.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
